basic_info.title: Lunar: Silver Star Story Complete
basic_info.review: A masterpiece of the JRPG genre, praised for its emotional storytelling, memorable characters, and beautiful soundtrack.

alternative_names: ルナ シルバースターストーリー

play_today.details: Officially remastered version with updated HD graphics, modern UI enhancements, full voice acting, and seamless integration of all original content. The definitive edition for modern systems.
Official PSP port with enhanced graphics and voice acting. Requires PPSSPP emulator for modern systems but retains the original charm while improving visual presentation.

recommended_patches.name: Lunar Silver Star Harmony Complete UNDUB
recommended_patches.description: Restores original Japanese audio with English subtitles for authentic experience

optimal_settings: Use recommended CPU core
Enable texture filtering
Adjust resolution scaling for modern screens
Enable hardware acceleration
Set GPU backend to Vulkan or OpenGL
Use native resolution with 2x anisotropic filtering

play_today.details: Original PlayStation port featuring expanded story content and additional gameplay features. Requires emulation for modern systems but offers a classic experience.

recommended_patches.name: English Translation Patch
recommended_patches.description: Fan translation to enable English language support for original Japanese version

recommended_patches.name: Classic Controls Hack
recommended_patches.description: Adjusts control scheme for better usability on modern systems

optimal_settings: Enable GSdx plugin for best compatibility
Set internal resolution to 1080p with bilinear filtering
Customize touch controls for combat actions
Enable Vsync to reduce screen tearing

play_today.details: Original release with the foundational story and gameplay mechanics that defined the series. Requires emulation with fan translations for English support.

recommended_patches.name: English Translation Patch
recommended_patches.description: Fan translation to enable English language support for original Japanese version

optimal_settings: Enable Sega CD BIOS emulation
Set audio buffer to 128KB for smoother playback
Use accurate timing mode for best performance
Adjust touch controls for menu navigation
Enable CD audio synchronization for better music quality

play_today.details: The definitive 'Complete' edition widely considered the best version. It features the full English localization, enhanced FMVs, and the complete soundtrack. While it requires emulation, it offers the most faithful experience to the original vision with no content cuts found in later remakes.

recommended_patches.name: Lunar SSS Complete Portrait Texture Pack
recommended_patches.description: Replaces original character portraits with AI-upscaled versions from the PSP remake for the PlayStation version, usable via RetroArch's Beetle PSX HW core texture replacement feature.

recommended_patches.name: Lunar SSS Complete 60FPS Patch
recommended_patches.description: Removes the 30FPS lock for smoother gameplay and cutscenes on the PlayStation version, often applied via emulator settings or specific core configurations.

optimal_settings: Internal Resolution: 2x Native for clean retro look or 4x for 4K sharpness
Enable NTSC mode for correct timing and color accuracy
Use texture filtering (bilinear) for smoother sprite scaling
Configure save states to auto-save every 5 minutes
Renderer: Vulkan for best performance on modern devices
Internal Resolution: 2x Native to balance performance and visuals
Enable Frame Skipping: Off for smooth cutscenes
Use Texture Dump/Replace feature for portrait enhancements

play_today.details: The original Japanese release offers the purest experience but lacks official English support. It is preferred by purists for its slightly faster load times and original audio mixing. Requires a fan translation patch to be playable for English speakers.

recommended_patches.name: Lunar Silver Star Story English Patch v1.5.1
recommended_patches.description: High-quality fan translation that replaces Japanese text with English for the Sega Saturn version, inserting the PSX English script and font. Supports the original non-MPEG edition.

recommended_patches.name: Lunar SSS English Text/Voice Patch v1.2
recommended_patches.description: An alternative translation patch for the Sega Saturn version that translates in-game Japanese text to English and includes voice adjustments, widely discussed in the Saturn community.

optimal_settings: Video: OpenGL for best compatibility and performance
Sound: SPU2 for accurate audio reproduction
CD-ROM: Full Speed to reduce load times
BIOS: Use official Sega Saturn BIOS for best compatibility
Renderer: OpenGL for smooth gameplay on mobile
Audio: SPU2 for accurate sound emulation
CD-ROM: Full Speed to minimize loading screens
Save States: Enable auto-save every 10 minutes

play_today.details: The PC port of the Saturn version. It is convenient to run but suffers from poor optimization, lack of widescreen support, and potential compatibility issues on modern OS. Only recommended if emulation is not an option.

recommended_patches.name: Lunar SSS PC English Patch
recommended_patches.description: Fan translation for the PC version of Lunar Silver Star Story, essential for English play as the original PC port lacks official localization.

recommended_patches.name: Lunar SSS PC Widescreen and Bugfix Patch
recommended_patches.description: Adds widescreen support and fixes compatibility issues on modern Windows operating systems for the PC port of Lunar Silver Star Story.

description.synopsis: Alex, a young boy living in the peaceful village of Silver Town, discovers he is the prophesied hero destined to save the world from the evil wizard Zoldark. Accompanied by his childhood friend Luna, a mysterious girl with the power to control the moon, Alex embarks on a journey to gather the legendary Lunar Stones. Along the way, he befriends a diverse group of companions, each with their own unique stories and struggles, as they face the looming threat of the Dark Lord and the corruption of the world's magic.
key_features: Expanded storyline with new characters and plotlines compared to the Sega CD original
Completely redrawn 2D sprite graphics with higher resolution
Full English localization by Working Designs with a polished script
Orchestral soundtrack arranged by Motoi Sakuraba
Enhanced battle system with cooperative attacks and status effects
Multiple endings based on player choices and character relationships
Detailed character customization through equipment and skill progression
Interactive world map with exploration and hidden secrets
legacy_and_impact: Lunar: Silver Star Story Complete is widely regarded as one of the greatest JRPGs of all time, setting a benchmark for localization quality in the 1990s. Its emotional narrative and Motoi Sakuraba's iconic soundtrack have influenced countless developers and remain beloved by fans decades later.
